LanguageData.VAEI_Apparel_Gag.description: An uncomfortable piece of fabric which covers the wearer's mouth, preventing them from speaking. Psychologically suppresses the wearer, but effectively prevents them from interacting socially with others.
LanguageData.VAEI_Apparel_Gag.label: gag
LanguageData.VAEI_Apparel_StraitJacket.description: An uncomfortable jacket with crossed sleeves that restrain the movement of the wearer. It psychologically suppresses them, reducing the chance of a slave rebellion. It also prevents the wearer from doing any harm to themselves and others by removing their ability to move their arms.
LanguageData.VAEI_Apparel_StraitJacket.label: straitjacket
LanguageData.VAEI_VoidDrawing.label: void drawing
